p.em: Progressive backoff escalation: Spin → Yield → Sleep

g.title: Entry point for thread attempting to acquire lock or resource
PAUSE instruction executed in user-space loop. Low latency.
Call to sched_yield(). Voluntary context switch.
Call to usleep() or futex_wait(). Process enters D/S state.

ul.li: logic: Thread remains in run-queue but moves to end.
logic: High latency; freed CPU for other processes.
